title: phaleria subcordata
intro: Phaleria subcordata, also known as Jarret or Jati Belendang, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phaleria subcordata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Phaleria subcordata is often prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
